top_signals.title: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
top_signals.summary: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India’s indigenous drone makers see orders surge for weaponised UAVs
top_signals.summary: Conflict in Iran pushes New Delhi to focus on domestic defence supply chains
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI Leans Toward Waiting Until 2027 for IPO, NY Times Says
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is leaning toward holding off on an initial public offering until 2027, the New York Times reported, citing three people involved in the company’s deliberations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Markets: Oil Majors Reload Exploration Hoppers Across Sub-Saharan Africa
top_signals.summary: Faced with declining production post-2030, across Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA), the Majors have started the process of reloading exploration hoppers. Targeting predominantly deep and ultra-deep waters, they have signed numerous agreements aimed…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Another Russian dairy company reportedly disrupted by cyberattack
top_signals.summary: A dairy products manufacturer in Russia's republic of Bashkortostan is the latest such company to have its operations snarled by a cyberattack.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
top_signals.summary: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.

top_signals.title: Bluekit phishing kit adopts browser-in-the-middle for login theft
top_signals.summary: The Bluekit phishing-as-a-service platform continues to evolve with nearly 70 new hostnames identified over the past week and by adding browser-in-the-middle capabilities for improved data theft. [...]
